title: Web Search MCP Server
description: Configure the MCP server. After the actor starts, connect your AI client to the provided MCP endpoint URL.

defaultMaxResults.title: Default max results
defaultMaxResults.description: Default number of search results returned per query (tools can override this).

braveApiKey.title: Brave Search API key (optional)
braveApiKey.description: Optional Brave Search API key for higher-quality results. Leave empty to use DuckDuckGo (no key required).

enableFetchTool.title: Enable fetch_page tool
enableFetchTool.description: Allow the MCP client to fetch and extract full page content from any URL.

enableNewsTool.title: Enable search_news tool
enableNewsTool.description: Allow the MCP client to search for recent news articles.

allowedDomains.title: Allowed domains for fetch_page (optional)
allowedDomains.description: Whitelist of domains the fetch_page tool can access. Leave empty to allow all.

logSearches.title: Log searches to dataset
logSearches.description: Save every search query and result count to the Apify dataset for auditing.
